Clements High School · Class of 2026

Hi, I'm Michael Ng

Engineering · Music · Scouting · Leadership

High school senior from Sugar Land, Texas with a passion for building things — from precision CAD models to mountain bikes to orchestral performances. Principal Bassoonist with the Houston Youth Symphony. Star Scout, Troop 731. National Science Olympiad medalist.

This portfolio should give you a glimpse of some things I've worked on both at school and in my free time. I would love to connect! Feel free to shoot me an email anytime.

03

Projects

Vitus Nucleus 275 VR
Mountain Bike

Vitus Nucleus 275 VR — Full Build & Maintenance (2021–Present)

Assembled from scratch in 2021 and continuously maintained and upgraded — an ongoing project.

  • Installed internally-routed dropper post
  • 3 drivetrain replacements: Box 4 → Microshift Advent 9-speed → Shimano Deore 11-speed
  • Hydraulic brake flush, bleed, and servicing
  • Air suspension service; repacked hub bearings
  • Drilled frame for full-length cable housing
  • Multiple grip and pedal swaps; regular maintenance throughout
Brother's Bike
Bike Build

Brother's Bike — Complete Build (2024)

Fully built and assembled a bike for my brother from the ground up — sourcing parts, fitting components, and handling all mechanical work independently.

Landfill Project
Engineering

Landfill Engineering Project (2022)

Engineering challenge designing a model landfill system, focusing on containment, drainage, and environmental impact mitigation.

Recycled Paper
Sustainability

Recycled Paper Project (2022)

Materials engineering project focused on the paper recycling process — exploring pulping, fiber reclamation, and sustainable materials production.

04

Service

Second Mile Mission

50+ hours of volunteering in food assistance operations, supporting families in need through the Second Mile Mission organization.

Houston Food Bank

20+ hours of volunteer service helping sort and distribute food to the community.

Ranger Camp Leader

Served as a volunteer leader at Ranger Camp 2024, Clements High School's annual Freshman Orientation program, helping welcome and guide incoming students during their transition to high school.

Den Chief — Pack 1800

Served as Den Chief for a Cub Scout pack from 2022–2025, teaching rank requirements and elective awards, and leading weekly pack activities to mentor younger Scouts.
